testsuite.name: agentforge.events.ExactlyOnceEventTest

testcase.name: consumer tracks offset and doesn't re-read committed events
committed transaction events are visible to consumer
duplicate event IDs within transaction are deduplicated
events on different topics are isolated
initTransactions must be called before beginTransaction
aborted transaction events are NOT visible to consumer
events sent outside transaction are immediately visible

testsuite.system-out: 08:31:26.356 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.events.EventProducer -- Producer producer-1 initialized transactions 08:31:26.357 [Test worker] DEBUG agentforge.events.EventProducer -- Producer producer-1 began transaction 08:31:26.359 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.events.EventProducer -- Producer producer-1 committed transaction (2 events) 08:31:26.376 [Test worker] DEBUG agentforge.events.EventProducer -- Producer producer-1 began transaction 08:31:26.376 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.events.EventProducer -- Producer producer-1 aborted transaction (1 events discarded) 08:31:26.380 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.events.EventProducer -- Producer producer-1 initialized transactions 08:31:26.380 [Test worker] DEBUG agentforge.events.EventProducer -- Producer producer-1 began transaction 08:31:26.380 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.events.EventProducer -- Producer producer-1 committed transaction (1 events) 08:31:26.381 [Test worker] DEBUG agentforge.events.EventConsumer -- Consumer consumer-group-1 polled 1 events from agentforge.task.dispatched (offset 0→1) 08:31:26.384 [Test worker] DEBUG agentforge.events.EventConsumer -- Consumer consumer-group-1 committed offset 1 for agentforge.task.dispatched 08:31:26.384 [Test worker] DEBUG agentforge.events.EventProducer -- Producer producer-1 began transaction 08:31:26.384 [Test worker]
